name: Shanghai Yimin Commercial Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Yimin Commercial Group Co., Ltd. operates department stores in China. The company also operates commercial properties; and offers quasi financial and equity investment services. Its brands include Gujin Underwear, Tianbao Longfeng, Oriental Pawn, and Xingguang Photographic. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Yimin Commercial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Yimin Commercial Group Co., Ltd. in November 2010. Shanghai Yimin Commercial Group Co., Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.
